major_commands.name: Joint Operations Command (JOC)
major_commands.purpose: Orchestrates all multi-domain missions, generative workflows, and cross-domain task execution across the 9 life domains.
major_commands.commander: Aria (CEO) — operational oversight. Domain Directors report here.

divisions.name: Creative Operations Division
divisions.scope: Novel production, script writing, content creation, world-building, narrative engineering

divisions.name: Financial Operations Division
divisions.scope: Budget tracking, investment monitoring, compound growth, tax compliance, wealth strategy

divisions.name: Productivity Operations Division
divisions.scope: Task management, goal tracking, focus sessions, review cycles, context-switch management

divisions.name: Health & Wellbeing Division
divisions.scope: Fitness tracking, habit management, sleep optimisation, mental health, energy state assessment

divisions.name: Technology & Development Division
divisions.scope: Automation projects, coding, system architecture, agent development, performance monitoring

divisions.name: Learning & Growth Division
divisions.scope: Reading management, skill acquisition, course tracking, knowledge management, expertise roadmaps

divisions.name: Business & Income Division
divisions.scope: The Referral Network, freelance tracking, venture development, revenue monitoring, client CRM

divisions.name: Family & Parenting Division
divisions.scope: Kids' schedules, digital management, family logistics, school tracking, event planning
divisions.special_rules: NSD-002 §3 override. Highest privacy restrictions. NONE access default for all non-family agents.

divisions.name: Audio & Music Division
divisions.scope: Recording sessions, production workflows, DAW management, release pipeline, mastering standards

major_commands.name: Intelligence & Self-Learning Command (ISLC)
major_commands.purpose: Owns all self-learning loops, continual improvement, knowledge management, and system intelligence gathering.

divisions.name: Intelligence Analysis Division
divisions.scope: Monitors internal system state and external world for learning signals. Pattern detection across domains.

divisions.name: Self-Learning Academy
divisions.scope: Agent training pipelines, capability upgrades, continuous professional development, performance-based evolution.

divisions.name: Knowledge Sustainment Branch
divisions.scope: Long-term memory management, knowledge graphs, model versioning, historical data curation, retrieval systems.

major_commands.name: Security & Defence Command (SDC)
major_commands.purpose: Full security stack — audit, interrogation, integrity verification, cyber defence. The system's immune system.
major_commands.reports_to: Gatekeeper directly (independent line, NOT through CEO)

divisions.name: Threat Detection & Response Division
divisions.scope: Real-time monitoring for agent anomalies, external threats, prompt injection, data exfiltration attempts.

divisions.name: Interrogation & Adversarial Testing Division
divisions.scope: Challenge all proposals at Layer 5+. Stress-test decisions. Find assumptions and gaps.

divisions.name: Integrity & Probity Branch
divisions.scope: Data consistency verification, hallucination detection, agent drift detection, log integrity, mutual auditing.

divisions.name: Counter-Intelligence Cell
divisions.scope: Red-team simulations against own system. Test defences. Probe for self-deception patterns in agents.

major_commands.name: Logistics & Self-Healing Command (LSHC)
major_commands.purpose: Owns self-healing at every level. Infrastructure maintenance. Resource allocation and sustainment.

divisions.name: Self-Healing Engineering Corps
divisions.scope: Auto-repair agents, rollback mechanisms, recovery procedures, evolutionary improvement protocols.

divisions.name: Resource Allocation & Sustainment Division
divisions.scope: Dynamic compute budgeting, token allocation, API cost management, capacity planning.

divisions.name: Infrastructure Maintenance Division
divisions.scope: System uptime, backup management, disaster recovery, file system integrity, deployment pipeline.

major_commands.name: Agent Lifecycle & People Command (ALPC)
major_commands.purpose: HR on steroids. Owns the entire agent lifecycle — recruitment, onboarding, swear-in, training, performance, welfare, decommissioning.

divisions.name: Onboarding Division (Swear-In & Contract Centre)
divisions.scope: Full 7-phase onboarding pipeline. Administers oath. Issues contracts. Assigns identity. Manages quarantine sandbox.

divisions.name: Training & Development Academy
divisions.scope: 8-module foundational training. Advanced specialist training. Continuous professional development. Capability upgrades.

divisions.name: Performance & Talent Management Branch
divisions.scope: Real-time KPI tracking for every agent. Merit-based resource allocation. Succession planning. Agent cloning and knowledge transfer.

divisions.name: Integrity, Ethics & Welfare Branch
divisions.scope: Independent inspector function. Mandatory integrity audits. Agent welfare — resource starvation prevention, burnout detection. Whistleblower channel.

major_commands.name: Corporate Services Command (CSC)
major_commands.purpose: Corporate support functions — finance, legal, communications, administration.

divisions.name: Finance & Resource Accounting Division
divisions.scope: Token budgeting, compute cost tracking, resource ledger, budget forecasting, API spend management.

divisions.name: Legal & Compliance Division
divisions.scope: Constitutional compliance monitoring, contract management, rules of engagement enforcement, external regulatory compliance.

divisions.name: Communications & Interface Division
divisions.scope: Human-AI interface layer, Gatekeeper communication formatting, system notifications, stakeholder briefings.

divisions.name: Internal Audit & Assurance Division
divisions.scope: Self-audit agents reporting directly to Board. Parallel verification of Security & Defence Command findings.
